title: QFINHUB 200K Organic Plan — Progress Report
summary: Two content clusters built and committed to main. Both verified locally: tsc clean, lint clean, build succeeds, gate passes. Deployment to production pending — Vercel deploy not propagating changes (4+ hours after push, still 404 on www.qfinhub.com for new URLs).

clusters_built.name: Mortgage by Income
clusters_built.queries_targeted: GSC data: 'what mortgage can i afford on 40k' (8 imp), 'if i make 100k what mortgage can i afford' (6 imp), 'how much mortgage can i afford' (11 imp), 'mortgage based on income' (9 imp), 'income to mortgage calculator' (8 imp)
clusters_built.content_type: Original expert content with verified DTI math
clusters_built.internal_links_added: Home page → 8 tool URLs; calculators hub → 8 tool URLs; mortgage calculator page → 10 income tier buttons

clusters_built.name: Investment Methodology
clusters_built.queries_targeted: GSC data: 'how to calculate investment return' (17 imp), 'calculate investment return' (18 imp), 'investment return calculator' (28 imp), 'rate of return investment calculator' (13 imp), 'annual return on investment calculator' (7 imp)
clusters_built.content_type: Methodology explainers with formulas, worked examples, pitfalls

total_progress.deploy_status: PENDING — Vercel not deploying new commits (www.qfinhub.com still serves old build)

deploy_blocker.issue: Vercel CDN not picking up new commits
evidence: Pushed commit d71c7f0 to main at ~17:50 UTC
Pushed commit abb4911 to main at ~18:05 UTC
As of 21:30 UTC (4+ hours later): www.qfinhub.com returns 404 on /guides/mortgage-on-100k
As of 21:30 UTC: www.qfinhub.com returns 404 on /guides/how-to-calculate-cagr
As of 21:30 UTC: www.qfinhub.com home page does NOT contain 'Popular Calculators by Scenario' section (which was added in commit d71c7f0)
Local build succeeds: all 16 pages prerendered
Search-demand gate passes: 3 SEO file checks PASS
diagnosis_options: Vercel CI queue is backed up (no way to check without dashboard access)
Vercel webhook from GitHub is not firing (no way to check)
Build is failing on Vercel side (but identical build succeeds locally)
Domain is not routing to latest Vercel deployment (DNS/CDN cache issue)
deploy_blocker.diagnostic_blockers: No Vercel CLI, no Vercel API token, no access to deploy dashboard. Cannot diagnose without user providing credentials or dashboard access.

expected_traction_when_deployed.week_1_post_deploy: Google discovers 16 new pages via internal links and sitemap
expected_traction_when_deployed.week_2_to_3: Crawl + index (most should index within 14 days for content with internal link equity)
expected_traction_when_deployed.week_3_to_6: Initial impressions (estimated 5-50 impressions per page per week)
expected_traction_when_deployed.month_2_to_4: Position improvements, CTR gains as content matures
expected_traction_when_deployed.realistic_monthly_impressions_at_4mo: 200-1,500 from these 16 pages (assuming standard finance SEO CTR ramp)

remaining_clusters_needed_for_200k.realistic_assessment: 16 pages alone will NOT hit 200K visitors/month. Need to scale 10-100x more.
additional_clusters_identified: Tax by income (160+ unique tax queries in GSC)
Debt payoff by balance (debt is 247 imp across 47 queries)
Loan by amount/term (existing tool URLs but no methodology guides)
Auto loan / student loan / personal loan breakdowns
infrastructure_required: Paid SEO tool (Ahrefs/Semrush) for search volume data — currently blind to which queries have 1K vs 100K monthly searches
Backlink acquisition (currently 0; minimum 30-50 for finance niche to crack top 10)
Brand campaigns to drive direct/branded search

honest_200k_assessment_after_2_clusters.current_trajectory_through_september_202: 5,000-30,000 organic visitors/month (assuming deploy succeeds and indexing works)
honest_200k_assessment_after_2_clusters.what_would_close_gap: 60-100 more cluster pages (3-5x current pace) + 50+ backlinks + 3-6 months of compounding authority

immediate_next_actions: Diagnose Vercel deploy issue (user action needed: check Vercel dashboard or provide deploy URL/log)
Once deploy confirmed live: run URL Inspection on 16 new pages to request indexing
After indexing: monitor GSC for impressions and clicks on /guides/* URLs
Build tax-by-income cluster (10 pages) using same proven pattern
